nodes.name: Schedule: Mon/Wed/Fri 10am CT
nodes.notes: Cron runs at 15:00 UTC = 10:00 AM Central Time

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 1024, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.instruction }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'dall-e-3', prompt: 'Professional LinkedIn post image for an auto repair shop AI software company. Dark navy blue background with orange accent elements. Show a modern auto repair shop environment with subtle tech/AI overlay — clean, minimal, corporate style. No text on the image. Photorealistic, high quality, 16:9 aspect ratio. Theme: ' + $json.postType.replace('_', ' '), n: 1, size: '1792x1024', quality: 'standard' }) }}

nodes.name: Telegram Trigger: Wait for Reply
nodes.notes: This is a separate trigger that listens for approval replies. Connect to the approval router below.

nodes.name: Fetch Pending Post
nodes.notes: TODO: Replace with Google Sheets lookup for latest pending_review row. Using env vars as placeholder.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ author: 'urn:li:organization:' + $env.LINKEDIN_ORG_ID, lifecycleState: 'PUBLISHED', specificContent: { 'com.linkedin.ugc.ShareContent': { shareCommentary: { text: $json.postText }, shareMediaCategory: $json.imageUrl ? 'IMAGE' : 'NONE' } }, visibility: { 'com.linkedin.ugc.MemberNetworkVisibility': 'PUBLIC' } }) }}

nodes.name: LinkedIn: Publish Post
nodes.notes: Posts to LinkedIn Company Page. Requires valid OAuth token with w_organization_social scope.

meta.description: Generates LinkedIn posts for AutoShop SMS AI on Mon/Wed/Fri at 10am CT. Uses Claude API for copywriting, DALL-E for images, Google Sheets for review tracking, and Telegram for approval flow before publishing to LinkedIn Company Page.
credentials: telegramApi — Telegram Bot for notifications and approval
googleSheetsOAuth2Api — Google Sheets for post tracking
